description_long: This is a three-story brick casino building with a rectangular footprint and a flat, shingled roof. The facade features tall, arched windows with white framing, arranged symmetrically across all visible sides. Decorative stone moldings run along the top edge of the building, adding a touch of classical ornamentation. The ground floor is distinguished by a lighter stone base and a central entrance with a small canopy labeled 'CASINO'. The structure is robust and solid, with subtle vertical pilasters and a muted color palette of red brick, gray stone, and white accents. The overall appearance is stately and formal, suitable for a prominent urban street corner.
description: A stately, three-story brick casino with arched windows, stone moldings, and a central entrance canopy labeled 'CASINO'. The building features a flat, shingled roof and classical decorative elements.
description_view_0: The long side of the casino with symmetrical arched windows and decorative stone moldings, no visible entrance.
description_view_1: The short side of the building, showing the depth and repeating window pattern, with no entrance visible.
description_view_2: The main facade with the central entrance canopy labeled 'CASINO', flanked by arched windows and a lighter stone base.
description_view_3: The opposite short side, similar to view 1, with visible downspout and repeating window pattern.
attribute_signage: A single, prominent sign above the main entrance reads 'CASINO' in bold, white letters on a dark background. The sign is mounted on a small canopy and is not illuminated.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is centrally located on the long facade, featuring a small, dark canopy with the word 'CASINO' above double doors. The entrance is framed by lighter stone and flanked by large arched windows.
attribute_facade_ornamentation: Decorative stone moldings run along the top edge of the building, with subtle vertical pilasters and a lighter stone base. The arched window frames and cornices add classical detailing.
attribute_architectural_style: Neoclassical with some late 19th-century urban influences, characterized by symmetrical facades, arched windows, and stone ornamentation.

license_info.creator_display_name: The Center for Digital Humanities UArizona
